mapper.sql: id, che_code, inventory_id, inventory_name, cdate, udate, status, user_id, user_name, dep_id, dep_name, "actual _num", sys_num, diff_reason, che_status, che_date
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from check_inventory
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into check_inventory (id, che_code, inventory_id, inventory_name, cdate, udate, status, user_id, user_name, dep_id, dep_name, "actual _num", sys_num, diff_reason, che_status, che_date) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cheCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{inventoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{actualNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sysNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{diffReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cheStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cheDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into check_inventory
id,
che_code,
inventory_id,
inventory_name,
cdate,
udate,
status,
user_id,
user_name,
dep_id,
dep_name,
"actual _num",
sys_num,
diff_reason,
che_status,
che_date,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{cheCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{inventoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{actualNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{sysNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{diffReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cheStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{cheDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update check_inventory
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
che_code = #{record.cheCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inventory_name = #{record.inventoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cdate = #{record.cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
udate = #{record.udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_name = #{record.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dep_id = #{record.depId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dep_name = #{record.depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
"actual _num" = #{record.actualNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sys_num = #{record.sysNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
diff_reason = #{record.diffReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
che_status = #{record.cheStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
che_date = #{record.cheDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update check_inventory set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, che_code = #{record.cheCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inventory_name = #{record.inventoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cdate = #{record.cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, udate = #{record.udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_name = #{record.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dep_id = #{record.depId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dep_name = #{record.depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "actual _num" = #{record.actualNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sys_num = #{record.sysNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, diff_reason = #{record.diffReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, che_status = #{record.cheStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, che_date = #{record.cheDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update check_inventory
che_code = #{cheCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_id = #{inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inventory_name = #{inventoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cdate = #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
udate = #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dep_id = #{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dep_name = #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
"actual _num" = #{actualNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sys_num = #{sysNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
diff_reason = #{diffReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
che_status = #{cheStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
che_date = #{cheDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update check_inventory set che_code = #{cheCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_id = #{inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inventory_name = #{inventoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cdate = #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, udate = #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dep_id = #{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dep_name = #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "actual _num" = #{actualNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sys_num = #{sysNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, diff_reason = #{diffReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, che_status = #{cheStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, che_date = #{cheDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select bb.material_name materialName, bb.specification, bb.shelf, bb.batch_number batchNumber, bb.model, aa.actual_num actualNum, aa.sys_num sysNum, aa.diff_reason diffReason, aa.che_status cheStatus from check_inventory aa join scm_inventory bb on aa.inventory_id=bb.id where aa.status=1 order by cdate desc
